user.title: Tuya Cloud credentials
user.description: Enter your Tuya IoT Platform credentials (developer.tuya.com). Device ID is auto-detected from existing Tuya Local devices.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to Tuya Cloud. Check credentials.
error.no_devices: No existing Tuya devices found. Please enter a Device ID manually.

new_device_found.title: New Tuya device: {name}
new_device_found.description:
Device **{name}** ({category}) found in Tuya Cloud but not in Tuya Local.

Device ID: `{device_id}`

**Add locally** for offline control, or **Create Cloud Entity** for voice assistant integration.

init.title: New device: {name}
init.description:
Device **{name}** (category: {category}, ID: `{device_id}`) is in Tuya Cloud but not controlled locally.

Choose an action:

discover.title: Network discovery: {name}
discover.description:
UDP scan: **{status}**

Select an IP from the list or type it manually.

Where to find IP: Tuya Smart app → device → pencil icon → Device Information → IP Address. Or check your router's DHCP table.

success.title: Device added: {name}
success.description:
**{name}** successfully added to Tuya Local at IP `{host}`.

The device is now controllable locally without internet.

cloud_stub.title: Cloud Entity: {name}
cloud_stub.description:
Cloud Entity creation is not yet available.

This feature will allow the device to be accessible via Yandex Alice, Alexa, and Google Home even when the device is battery-powered and cannot be controlled locally.

**Coming soon.**

error.invalid_ip: Please enter a valid IP address.
error.connection_failed: Could not connect to device at this IP. Check the address or try another.

abort.connection_failed: Cannot connect to device. Check IP address and ensure device is online.
abort.tuya_local_already_configured: This device is already configured in Tuya Local.
abort.tuya_local_not_supported: Device type not supported by Tuya Local.
abort.unexpected_flow_result: Unexpected result from Tuya Local setup. Check logs for details.
abort.creation_failed: Failed to create Tuya Local entry. Check logs for details.
